title: The Angel Numbers NO SPOILERS
wikitext:
[]: The Angel Numbers [NO SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Eva Unit 18 » Sun Nov 08, 2009 5:30 am In rebuild 2.0 they skipped a lot of angels does anybody know if they will appear in 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Nov 08, 2009 5:53 am No. At best, there will be twelve Angels all together, with Kaworu might acting as a surprise 13-th. EDIT: As in, he is either the 12-th or the 13-th.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 6:06 am Kaworu is most likely the 12th Angel, and since the 3rd and 7th Angel were brand-new Angels (though some of a melding of series Angels) the same can probably be said for whatever the 11th is.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Nov 08, 2009 1:20 pm Note this isn't anything new to the series. The manga had, what...twelve Angels too?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Nov 08, 2009 4:21 pm Yep the manga had 12 and the series had 17, 18th if you count us Lilin.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Unit 18 » Mon Nov 09, 2009 2:50 am Dammit I wanted to see Isfrael

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Tue Dec 01, 2009 11:22 pm With everyone coming back for rebuild I'm sure Sadamoto found a way to get them to go along with part of the manga. Then again it'd be simpler to go along with the manga numbers because of time. Sachiel in 1.0 was said to be the 5th so they starter off with a large number already.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Dec 01, 2009 11:34 pm Sachiel was the 4th.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Wed Dec 02, 2009 11:56 pm Hiten777 wrote: With everyone coming back for rebuild I'm sure Sadamoto found a way to get them to go along with part of the manga. Then again it'd be simpler to go along with the manga numbers because of time. Sachiel in 1.0 was said to be the 5th so they starter off with a large number already.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Fri Dec 04, 2009 12:10 am I would think that think both Kaworu and Mark 06 fill the 11th and 12th spots (though not necessarily in that order).

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Dec 04, 2009 3:05 am Rawinder wrote: I would think that think both Kaworu and Mark 06 fill the 11th and 12th spots (though not necessarily in that order).

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Dec 05, 2009 8:04 pm Eva 04 wrote: Rawinder wrote: I would think that think both Kaworu and Mark 06 fill the 11th and 12th spots (though not necessarily in that order).

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Dec 05, 2009 9:13 pm It wasn't naked, it was in a big-ass jumpsuit.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Dec 05, 2009 9:22 pm Or some sort of bodybag?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sun Dec 06, 2009 2:44 am wonderluster wrote: Eva 04 wrote: Rawinder wrote: I would think that think both Kaworu and Mark 06 fill the 11th and 12th spots (though not necessarily in that order).

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun Dec 06, 2009 3:06 am My personal theory is that Kaworu and Mark06 will form the final Angel together: Kaworu as the "soul", and Mark06 as the body.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun Dec 06, 2009 2:33 pm SaltyJoe wrote: My personal theory is that Kaworu and Mark06 will form the final Angel together: Kaworu as the "soul", and Mark06 as the body.
